question: Why is Michelle able to easily pass the physical test?
response: Michelle was able to easily pass the physical test because her scores (27-29 push-ups, 55-56 situps, 57.4-56.0 in the 300-meter sprint, and 5 pull-ups) totaled 19 points, exceeding the 12-point minimum required to pass.
